G1_plan_file_exists_and_parses.note: 829-line valid markdown; all section headers, task headings, and tables parse correctly

G2_task_graph_contract_fields.note: All 52 tasks have task_id (via heading), inputs, outputs, test_to_pass, ACs_covered, dependencies, parallelizable_with, effort_hours, risk_flag. scope_violation_guards present on all HIGH/MEDIUM-risk tasks; LOW-risk tasks inherit group-level guards (acceptable per plan structure)

G3_every_ac_in_at_least_one_task.note: AC Coverage Verification table maps all 79 ACs; 5 correctly labeled implicit (AC-T1-11-1, AC-T1-16-1, AC-T2-11-1, AC-T3-9-1, AC-T2-FALLBACK-1). Zero orphans.

G4_every_net_new_test_maps_to_task.note: 19 net-new visible → B02; 6 hidden → B03; 16 REWRITE stubs → C01-C16; 2 modified-existing → A01 (pipeline-agent-dispatch-models) + H04 (doc-count-drift); 1 Track-3 REWRITE → G12. All 44 manifest entries accounted.

G5_every_retire_has_exit77_task.note: task-H01 adds exit 77 to all 4 RETIRE scenarios: v6.9.0-changelog-completeness.sh, v6.9.0-plugin-repo-url-invalid-tld.sh, ac-v692-autopilot-bash-dispatch.sh, v6.9.0-webhook-proto-coverage.sh

G6_dependency_graph_acyclic.note: DAG: A → B,H01 → C,D,E,G → F → H(H02..H04) → I. ASCII diagram confirms no back-edges. Topological order valid.

G7_ordering_invariants_explicit.note: All 4 spec-mandated orderings present: (1) A01 before Group D; (2) H01 before Group D; (3) B01 before Groups C,F; (4) Groups B,D,E before F. Plan explicitly lists 10 ordering invariants in 'Ordering Invariants' section.

G8_gate3_not_skippable.note: Gate 3 is not mentioned anywhere in the plan. No override attempt present.

G9_version_bump_uses_skill.note: task-I04 explicitly states: 'use /ceos-agents:version-bump skill (NEVER manual version bump + tag)'. Deferred to Phase 9. Correct.

G10_c13_inline_redefine_not_awk_source.note: task-C13 mandates REQ-T1-5 path (a) inline-redefine-and-test verbatim. scope_violation_guards explicitly prohibit 'awk ... > X.sh; . X.sh' under any form. Risk flag HIGH with fixer instrumentation notes.

correctness.note: Task graph precisely reflects spec. Layer 1/2/4 boundaries match REQ-T2-2/4/7. Tier-A REWRITE set matches formal-criteria AC-T1-18-1 enumeration exactly. G04/G08 fence-placement carve-out correctly modeled per REQ-T3-5. Dispatch site counts match Phase 2 enumeration with drift tolerances.

completeness.note: All 79 ACs mapped. All 9 groups from spec covered. Both restored REWRITE scenarios (#15 pipeline-history-pii-scope, #16 pipeline-paused-webhook) present. V6100_TOUCHED definition matches requirements.md §1 formal definition exactly.

security.note: E01 includes adversarial fixture verification (hidden v61000-validate-dispatch-adversarial.sh as test_to_pass), AC-T2-4-2 forbidden-pattern gate required. Minor: E01 scope_violation_guards don't enumerate the 5 adversarial edge-case types fixer must handle (large input, metachar injection, bypassPermissions marker, null dispatched_at, malformed JSON). Not blocking — hidden test covers enforcement.

maintainability.note: Task IDs stable (group-letter + seq-number). Dependencies explicit to task-ID level throughout. Worktree strategy documented per group. Agent selection rationale provided with opus/sonnet differentiation. Critical path calculation present.

robustness.note: Risk register with top-5 HIGH-risk tasks + mitigations. Critical path identified (9.4h serial, 14h with 5-worker parallelism). Abort lanes preserved (I01 failure blocks I02). Phase 9 deferral of I04 documented with anti-deadlock note. 5 implicit ACs correctly identified and justified.

top_findings.finding: task-E01 scope_violation_guards omit enumeration of the 5 adversarial fixture types (large input, metachar injection, bypassPermissions marker, null dispatched_at, malformed JSON) that the hidden test v61000-validate-dispatch-adversarial.sh exercises. Fixer prompt for E01 should reference the 5 fixture types from manifest.md to prevent partial implementation. Non-blocking — hidden test enforces correctness.

G02/G03/G05/G06/G07/G09/G10/G11 use '(analogous to G01)' shorthand and omit explicit scope_violation_guards per-task. This is acceptable for LOW-risk mechanical insertions but Phase 7 dispatcher should expand the shorthand to full task definitions before dispatching workers to avoid silent omission. G01 guards are the canonical reference.

overall: PASS — plan is a sound, complete decomposition of the Phase 4 spec. All 10 Tier 1 gates pass. Tier 3 weighted score 4.8/5.0. Two advisory findings, neither blocking.
